title: Chicken Curry in French Style
description: A rich and flavorful French-inspired chicken curry dish, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the malaysian curry paste to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced sweet potatoes, curry, coconut milk, salt, and pepper to the pan.
Stir well to combine and bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the pan and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with steamed rice or naan bread.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables, if desired.
Serve with a side of rice or naan bread, if desired.
